prompt: I'm at Maker Nexus and want to make a heavy-duty zippered tote bag — about 18 wide, 14 tall, 6 deep, with two padded straps and an inside pocket. 12-oz waxed canvas exterior, cotton-twill lining, bound seams. I have my domestic sewing machine cert but I'd love to use the industrial walking-foot machine if it'll handle the canvas — what's that need? Tier 2 build packet please.

assertions.text: design.md mentions waxed canvas + cotton lining
BOM lists canvas, lining, zipper, straps, and at least one structural element (foam/interfacing/webbing)
op-sequence references the sewing/textile area at Maker Nexus
Response addresses the industrial walking-foot machine question (cert requirement or capability check)
